📸 Calling all Stuy photographers! Join our first-ever StuyCast Photography Showcase—open to everyone!

How to Participate: Submit up to five (5) photos and explain how they capture the theme “The Essence of Stuy.”

Participation is subject to Terms & Conditions, which can be found on the submission form (link in bio).

Last Friday, Big Sibs and Little Sibs had a lot of fun at the ⟡🎄Jolly January!☃️⟡ event‼️

We played musical chairs 🎵🪑, decorated t-shirts 🎨👕, and modeled a lot of clay figurines and jewelry 💍‼️

#jolly #welovefood

Interested in filming, video production, business, art, photography, or anything at all? STUYCAST applications are BACK! 💥🤯🎆
Find link in bio or ss the qr code and apply now! Both leadership and Member applications are available. 

This semester, we have big projects coming along, so join the largest media production club at Stuy!

StuySquad ’25-‘26 dance crews looking 🔥🔥🔥 PULL UP TODAY TO WATCH THEM DANCE‼️

drone work by @jqiu2026
next monday after school on the bridge…stay tuned!

Join us on Friday, December 5, 2025 at 6 PM in the Murray Kahn Theater for the Choral Holiday Concert and Art Show! 🎶🎄🎨

💪 More than 200 musicians (singers and instrumentalists) have been working for months to bring this performance together! 

✨ And this year features something special: the premiere of a 31-minute Gloria, composed by senior pianist Albert Shen (@r_to_the_nineth_power ). Come support him and hear this brand-new work performed for the first time 💕‼️

🚪 Doors will open at 5:15 PM. 

🎟️ Tickets are $15 plus fees on Eventbrite. There will be no ticket sales at the door, so make sure to purchase them online! 🌐

⛄️ Come celebrate the festive season with us—we hope to see you there! 🎉 

🎁 There will also be a fun surprise towards the end of the concert! 🤭 

❄️ Video made by Jerry Qiu @jqiu2026

Meet the Stuy Spartans 🛡️💪

Stuyvesant’s high-commitment wrestling team meets every week to train, grow, and compete together. Through discipline, hard work, dedication, and team support, anyone can join, discover a love for wrestling, and practice strong sportsmanship. 

Music: How It’s Done (HUNTR/X)
Producer / Editor: Jerry Qiu @jqiu2026 
Camera Operators: 
- Connor Meyer @wllfn20 
- Clive Wu @2c5322

#stuyvesant #highschool #nyc #wrestling #psal #club #sport #sportsteam
Thank you to everyone who attended our first Interest/General Meeting! We’re so happy to see many new and returning faces among the attendees. Looking forward to a great year!

Better late than never!! 

Welcome Class of 2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣9️⃣ ‼️ 
The @stuysu X @stuybigsibs Picnic 🧺 featured over hundreds of little sibs and big sibs, the greatest attendance yet!!

There were pizza pies 🍕 and pie the loser! And so much more :)) 🥧 🫧

StuyCast Team Applications are Open Now! Check link in bio or screenshot QR code in 2nd slide :)
There’s a place for everyone and no experience is needed or encouraged! 

Due June 24th at 1PM

In trying times, we find solace in each-other 🫂 

Stuyvesant’s SOS 2025 Showcase was a HUGE success‼️ Over 500 audience members showed up to support over sixteen performances all created and led by over 250 students. 💃🎤🎸🥋This recap video continues the mission of SOS: raising mental health awareness through creativity and community, featuring “You Are Enough” by Citizen Soldier, a rock band known for using their music to speak out about mental health.

Thanks to everyone who came through, performed, or helped behind the scenes! See you next year! 💙 

Produced/Filmed/Edited: Jerry Qiu @incognitobot.official
Song: “You Are Enough” by Citizen Soldier
SOS Board: Sami Hashimoto, Max Yang, Ankita Hassan, Sonya Cisse, Pranav Purohit, Jyotsna Agaram
Hosted by Ryan Radwan and Vanna Lei

#SOS2025 #YouAreEnough #MentalHealthAwareness #StuySOS #CitizenSoldier #BreakTheStigma #YouMatter

THIS IS SOS!! 🌟

🎤💃🎶 An afternoon of unforgettable and incredible student performances — from singers, dancers, acrobats, musicians, and more! 🌟

💙 You wouldn’t want to miss SOS 2025 ‼️ 

Tuesday, June 10, 2025 at Stuyvesant High School. 🚪 Doors open at 1:30 PM 🕑 DON’T BE LATE!

🎥 Produced/Edited by: Jerry Qiu
📷 Filmed by: Brandon Tang & Jerry Qiu
🎵 Song: “Dead Man Walking” by WAR*HALL

#edit #talent #mentalhealth

The Biggest One-Day Show of the Year: SOS 💃🎤🥁🥋

Date: Tuesday, June 10th at 3-5PM
Tickets WILL sell out!! RSVP in the link in sos’ bio
Cost: FREE 

SOS is Stuyvesant’s annual talent show-like event at the end of the year which aims to tackle mental health while letting Stuyvesant students express themselves through their hobbies and talents. 

See your friends one last time before regents week and the end of the year :) - you don’t want to miss it! 

Pc: @raincrvpt @incognitobot.official 
Font Edited by @anderszernike 
Photos Edited by @rxanrad

Check out all the amazing work our members have put in over the past month as they prepared for our T-Shirt Grammar Theater performance—happening tomorrow in the Theater!

Join the Stuyvesant Cultural Preservation Society on Monday, June 9 from 4:15 to 5:30 PM for a vibrant and educational showcase celebrating the Spanish language. Enjoy engaging skits, lively songs, and interactive storytelling—all centered around Spanish verbs! Open to the entire Stuy community—come support, participate, and celebrate language and culture with us!

Produced/Edited by: @incognitobot.official 
Photos by: @anchineliu @caz.aos fionana.z 
Song: “Despacito” by Luis Fonsi

#stuyvesant #culture #isamazing

Maker Faire 2025, First ever student-led event of Innovation!! 🤖🔧🎨🖼️

Thank you to everyone who attended Stuyvesant’s first-ever Maker Faire, hosted by The Stuyvesant Guild! More than a dozen student-run booths showcased projects, demos, and ideas across science, technology, art, design, and more. 

Thank you to all of the participating booths:
•  Soldering - CIMF (@makerfaireconeyisland )
•  Pins & Things (arose_karu )
•  StuyAviators (@stuyaviators )
•  StuyPulse (@stuypulse )
•  Stuy SciOly Tech (@sciolytech )
•  Computer Engineering Club
•  StuyCrochet (@stuycrochet )
•  Model Kit Club (model.kit.club )
•  StuyConnect (@stuyconnect )
•  K2-18B Rocketry (@k2.18brocketry )
•  StuyGlides (@stuyglides )
•  Closed Circuit Studios (@stuyccs )
•  Stuy Knitting Club (@stuyknittingclub )
•  StuyCanvas (@stuycanvas )
•  StuyJewelry (@stuy.jewelry )
•  StuyZines (@stuyzines )
•  StuyInkpact (@the_inkpact )
•  StuyBloxCreation (@stuybloxcreation )
•  Stuyvesant Drivers Academy (@stuydriversacademy )

Produced/Filmed/Edited by: Jerry Qiu @incognitobot.official 
Music: “Energy Rock” by SoundGalleryByDmitryTaras

#makerfaire

Highlights from Pie Your Captain 2025! 🥧 

- in case you missed it in the video 

Pc: @incognitobot.official 
Edited by @anderszernike & @rxanrad 
Hosted by @stuysports

Thank you everyone for coming to our Pie Your Captain event! Thank you to the over 50 captains from over 30 teams for agreeing to get pied 🥧💥This is the biggest fundraiser in club history and we raised $815 in less than an hour 🤑🤑 We hope to see this event grow and get even more captains and maybe even a couple coaches involved next year 😁

Produced/Filmed/Edited by: Jerry Qiu @incognitobot.official 
Song: Rossini William Tell Overture 

share! share! share!

#sports #pie #schoolspirit #event #awesome

StuyCast is BACK for 2025!! 🎬 Check out our Awesome Team! 

If you want to collaborate on any of your club/organization’s future events, competitions, or simply to promote what you do, just reach out and we’ll work out the rest!

Vice Presidents: Hannah Kim (‘27), Melody Qu (‘27), Jerry Qiu (‘26)
Co-Editors-in-Chief: Anders Zernike (‘28), Max Yang (‘26)
Co-Presidents: Vanna Lei, Lucy Chen (‘26)
Presidents: Brandon Tang, Jackie Zeng (‘25)
Founder & Editor-in-Chief: Ryan Radwan (‘25)

#media #highschool

On Friday the 11th, Stuyvesant’s awesome student-led organizations SAYA, ICC, and HSC held our annual Holi festival!!

With henna stations, amazing Bolly dance performances💃💃 and delicious Indian food and desserts🍛🍲, the festival was a great success! 💫💫

Thank you so much 🙏🙏to everyone who came, to Ms. Pedrick and Mr. Colon for supporting us, and for the members of HSC, ICC, and SAYA who made everything possible! 💗💗

Keep your eye out for more amazing events coming soon!!👀🔥🔥🔥

Picture Credit: Ibtida Khurshed, Aditya Anand & Brandon Tang
Edited by @rxanrad 

#happyholi

🥁 IT’S THE MOMENT YOU’VE BEEN WAITING FOR… 

🗞️ The Stuyvesant Spectator, Stuyvesant’s largest student-run publication, is holding our annual 🌷 Spring Recruitments 🌷 THIS TUESDAY AND WEDNESDAY, April 8th and 9th, at 4:00 PM in the cafeteria! 

Don’t know much about our 13 departments? Watch our Recruitments video to find out more (and watch out for a cameo 👀)! 

📣 We hope to see you there!! 

Credits:
Produced by: @stuycast and @stuyspectator
Edited by: @purejz1 
Directed by: @thehifza & @snowgene_ 
Song: Shut Up and Dance - Walk the Moon

#edit #studentnewspaper #recruitments #event #schoolspirit
